🎉 Create a Board
🔗Connections

Connect Recognition With the Tools Your Team Already Uses

WorkKudo integrates into your existing workplace ecosystem so recognition happens where employees already work — no additional apps to learn or platforms to switch between.

Explore IntegrationsSee How It Works
WorkKudo — Connections
💬
Slack IntegrationSend recognition from within Slack
🟦
Microsoft TeamsCelebrate inside Teams channels
🔄
HRIS SyncAutomated milestone triggers
💬 Slack
🟦 Teams
🔄 HRIS

Employees Shouldn't Need Another Platform to Stay Recognized

Adoption of any new workplace tool depends on how seamlessly it fits into existing workflows. If recognition requires switching contexts, it won't happen consistently.

Connections embed WorkKudo directly into the platforms employees already use every day — reducing friction, increasing adoption, and making recognition feel natural rather than forced.

1New platforms create adoption friction that limits participation
2Employees won't check a separate app for recognition
3Disconnected tools mean missed milestones and manual effort
4HRIS data stays siloed, preventing automated celebrations
🔌
Seamless IntegrationWorks inside tools you already use
⚡
Zero FrictionNo platform switching required
🤖
Automated WorkflowsTrigger recognition automatically

Bring Recognition Into Your Existing Workplace Ecosystem

Connections integrate WorkKudo with the platforms and systems your organization already depends on.

💬

Slack Integration

Send and receive recognition directly from Slack. Board links, contribution reminders, and delivery notifications all flow through Slack channels.

🟦

Microsoft Teams

Celebrate teammates inside Microsoft Teams with embedded board previews, contribution invitations, and recognition notifications.

🔄

HRIS Integrations

Sync with Workday, BambooHR, Rippling, and HiBob to automatically trigger recognition for birthdays, anniversaries, and new hires.

📧

Email Delivery

Deliver completed recognition boards via beautifully formatted email — with full board preview and personal message.

🔌

API Access

Connect WorkKudo with any internal tool or workflow using our API for custom integrations and automation.

🤖

Workflow Automation

Set up automated recognition flows that trigger based on HRIS events, calendar dates, or custom organizational logic.

How It Works

01
🔌

Connect Your Tools

Set up integrations with your existing platforms — Slack, Teams, HRIS — in just a few steps.

02
⚡

Recognition Flows In

Contribution invitations, reminders, and board links are delivered through your connected platforms.

03
💬

Teams Participate

Employees contribute directly from within Slack or Teams — no platform switching needed.

04
🎉

Celebrate Together

Completed recognition experiences are delivered through your connected channels and tools.

🔌

Connect Your Tools

Set up integrations with your existing platforms — Slack, Teams, HRIS — in just a few steps.

Why It Matters

⚡

Easy Adoption

Recognition that lives inside existing tools gets used. No new platform means no adoption barrier.

🔗

Reduced Friction

Employees contribute to boards without leaving Slack or Teams — making participation effortless.

🤝

Better Participation

Meeting employees where they work dramatically increases contribution rates and recognition frequency.

🌊

Seamless Workflows

Automated triggers and notifications keep recognition moving without requiring manual effort from HR.

⏱️

Time Savings

HRIS sync eliminates manual milestone tracking and ensures no celebration is ever missed.

🏗️

Future-Proof

API access means WorkKudo can connect with any platform you adopt in the future.

Connections — FAQs

How WorkKudo integrates with your existing workplace tools.

Make Recognition Part of How Your Team Already Works

Connect WorkKudo to Slack, Teams, your HRIS, and more — so recognition happens naturally, consistently, and without friction.
